keywords.clusterLabel: その他の研究キーワード

分析化学 とは、試料中の化学成分の種類や存在量を解析したり、解析のための目的物質の分離方法を研究したりする化学の分野である。

未来学 は、歴史上の状況を踏まえて未来での物事がどう変わっていくかを詳細に調査・推論する学問分野である。

notes.category_policy: 4 fixed categories: 0=生物名・分類群名; 1=研究手法・技術; 2=学問分野名; 3=その他の研究キーワード
notes.replacement_policy: The supplied keyword list was normalized, deduplicated, and ordered by first appearance. Exact Japanese/English translation duplicates and orthographic variants were unified in favor of Japanese labels.
notes.deduplication_note: Unified アニマルウェルフェア into 動物福祉, 古典的条件づけ into 古典的条件付け, 母仔関係 into 母子関係, 生物音響学 into 生物音響, and 数理モデリング into 数理モデル. English-only technical, theoretical, or taxonomic labels were retained when no Japanese duplicate was supplied.
notes.layout_policy: All 2D coordinates were regenerated using curated semantic themes within each fixed class. Related organisms, methods, disciplines, behaviors, neural/sensory concepts, ecological concepts, and application terms are placed around shared conceptual anchors; no language-distance mapping was used.
notes.classification_note: Classification follows primary function in the supplied research context. Taxa are class 0; analytical, experimental, measurement, modeling, intervention, tracking, telemetry, software, and robotic terms are class 1; established academic fields are class 2; behaviors, biological states, structures, mechanisms, contexts, and application concepts are class 3. 魚群 was moved to class 3; 群制御, 種間比較, 迷路, アクティブセンシング, and 社会ネットワーク were treated as methods/technologies; Quantum logic was treated as a formal field.
notes.update_summary: Added 31 previously missing supplied keywords, re-audited all classifications, regenerated all within-class coordinates, and recalculated cluster counts.
